body_direct:

As Sephora grows to 35% of revenue, your DTC channel needs to work harder. GR0 helps beauty brands like yours turn organic search into a profitable acquisition channel, reducing dependence on rising paid media costs.

We've driven 3x organic traffic growth for DTC beauty brands while improving conversion rates on Shopify.

Worth a 15-minute call to see if there's a fit?

Best,

subject_curiosity: Glossier You sells every 40 seconds, but...
body_curiosity:
Hi Emily,

Glossier You flies off shelves, yet when I search "best everyday perfume" or "clean girl fragrance," Glossier is buried beneath competitors.

That's a massive discovery gap. The people actively searching for exactly what you sell are finding someone else first.

We help DTC beauty brands own these high-intent searches and turn Google into their most efficient acquisition channel.

Interested in seeing the opportunity we've mapped out?

Best,

subject_pain: The CAC squeeze hitting DTC beauty
body_pain:
Hi Emily,

Every DTC beauty brand we talk to says the same thing: paid acquisition costs are up 30-40% while returns keep shrinking.

The brands winning right now are shifting budget toward organic search, where customers have buying intent and CAC stays flat.

We've helped beauty brands cut blended CAC by 25% while scaling revenue.

Happy to share what's working if you're exploring alternatives to the paid media treadmill.

Best,
[Name]
